In Robin Hood, the rooster character Alan-a-Dale sings "Whistle Stop" and "Oo-De-Lally" - both composed by Roger Miller.

The Hampsterdance Song by Hampton the Hampster used the same "Whistle Stop" melody but at a different tempo (sped up), and eventually there were versions with added lyrics (like "The Hampsterdance Song" which had lyrics added).
